revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (en:Buke (Japan)); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/433620629 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{talkheader}} == German WP insight ==     The following red-linked entry appears on the German WP at the Dab [[de:Buke]]: : * [[Buke (Adel)]], japanischer Schwertadel aus denen die Samurai hervorgingen While i've not previously encountered the compounds ''Schwertadel'' and ''hervorgingen'' (past tense of ''hervorgehen''), i'm far more confident that it translates to : * Buke (nobility), Japanese sword-nobility, out of which the samurai emerged than the lack of sources would permit one to be about the value of even the perfect translation. It is thus that i wrote : Its modern sense may be derived from a term referring to the armed nobility from which the samurai class arose. as a starting point for the further research, by others, that will in any case be needed.
--[[User:Jerzy|Jerzy]]•[[User talk:Jerzy|t]] 21:29, 10 June 2011 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Buke here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/433620629 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{talkheader}} == German WP insight ==     The following red-linked entry appears on the German WP at the Dab [[de:Buke]]: : * [[Buke (Adel)]], japanischer Schwertadel aus denen die Samurai hervorgingen While i've not previously encountered the compounds ''Schwertadel'' and ''hervorgingen'' (past tense of ''hervorgehen''), i'm far more confident that it translates to : * Buke (nobility), Japanese sword-nobility, out of which the samurai emerged than the lack of sources would permit one to be about the value of even the perfect translation. It is thus that i wrote : Its modern sense may be derived from a term referring to the armed nobility from which the samurai class arose. as a starting point for the further research, by others, that will in any case be needed.
--[[User:Jerzy|Jerzy]]•[[User talk:Jerzy|t]] 21:29, 10 June 2011 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:56, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
